title: Implement gun registry API: Java registration + data pack JSON loading to modularshoot:guns

reference_files.reason: API overview - registration API table, Java + data pack dual registration, registry paths
Gun registration API example - Java API call structure
Gun data pack JSON format - field structure for data pack loading
Registration conflict and override rules, loading order

acceptance_criteria: GunRegistry API class provides method to register gun definitions by ResourceLocation ID + GunDefinition
Java API registration writes to the modularshoot:guns dynamic registry during mod initialization
Data pack JSON files at data/<namespace>/modularshoot/guns/<id>.json are automatically loaded by the DataPackRegistry mechanism
API provides lookup method: getGun(ResourceLocation) returns Optional<GunDefinition> from the registry
API provides method to list all registered gun IDs
Java API registration takes priority over data pack JSON for same ID (per conflict rules)
Helper method exists to create a gun ItemStack with a given gunId (sets GunData component)
